content.speakerText: Hi there! You must be Ms. Chen from ABC Corp?
content.speakerTextCn: 您好！您一定是来自ABC公司的陈女士吧？

options.text: Yes, that's me! Thanks for having me.
I don't know who you're talking about.
No, you've got the wrong person.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用肯定语气+感谢，符合初次见面建立好感的社交礼仪。干扰项中，'I don't know...' 和 'No...' 显得冷漠无礼，'Maybe...' 则显得犹豫不决，都不符合专业商务场景的积极回应标准。

content.speakerText: Welcome to our office! How was your trip?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎来到我们公司！旅途怎么样？

options.text: It was smooth, thanks! The train was on time.
Terrible! The flight was delayed for 5 hours.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供积极细节，展现真诚与礼貌。'Okay, I guess' 过于冷淡，'I don't remember' 显得不礼貌，'Terrible!' 虽真实但负面，不适合初次见面营造友好氛围。

content.speakerText: Good morning! I'm Lisa from the reception team. Welcome to our headquarters!
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好！我是接待部的Lisa，欢迎来到我们总部！

options.text: Hi Lisa, nice to meet you. I'm Alex from TechNova. Thank you for the warm welcome!
I didn't know you were expecting me.
Is this the right building? I'm confused.

content.explanation: 正确答案包含自我介绍、感谢和积极回应，符合初次问候的完整礼仪。'Yeah, thanks' 过于随意，后两个选项质疑对方或表达困惑，破坏友好氛围。
